Quiz_1.Question: What was the official opening date of Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center, Hall 1?

Quiz_2.Question: Which of the following is NOT one of the green building indicators achieved by TaiNEX 1?

Options.A: Organizers are encouraged to cover all aisle floors with carpeting during exhibitions.
Options.B: Some printed promotional materials in TaiNEX 1 use double-sided printing.
Options.C: Manual faucets are installed in restrooms to reduce water consumption.
Options.D: Escalators and elevators remain fully operational during non-exhibition or non-event periods.

Quiz_3.Question: Which of the following statements regarding "Green Operations" is INCORRECT?

Quiz_4.Question: On which floors are the exhibition halls of Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center, Hall 2 located?
